reviews.comment:
Atienden muy lento..no saben coordinarse y dejan que se sume una cola de autos totalmente innecesaria.. consejo. No se bajen del auto para cargar .. Solo molestan a la interminable fila que tienen atrás. Si Quieren empatizar con el playero déjenlé propina.. el Sr esta trabajando no haciendo amigos nuevos.. Pongan orden o busquen una estrategia para despachar a tiempo por favor..

(Translated by Google)
They're incredibly slow... they can't coordinate and they let a completely unnecessary line of cars form... advice: don't get out of your car to fill up... you're just slowing down the endless line behind you. If you want to show empathy to the attendant, leave a tip... the man is working, not making new friends. Please get organized or find a strategy to serve customers on time.

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia Daniel, lamentamos mucho la mala experiencia de servicio que obtuviste, estamos trabajando para remediarlo, podes comunicarte via mail al siguiente correo: info.acabelgrano@gmail.com, te esperamos nuevamente en YPF ACA Belgrano.

reviews.comment:
Ayer fui a cargar nafta, a mi moto, cerca de las 19:30 hs.
Solo le hice el comentario al playero de que atendió a 2 autos que llegaron después que yo antes que a mi, MAMITAAAA, me contestó con tanta ira que le tuve que responder que UNA PAJA es más sano! Pobre tipo, un desastre.
1er cargador mas cercano a la vereda, tez oscura, acento no porteño, no quise ni preguntarle el nombre. MUCHA IRA MANEJABA. 🤦🏻‍♀️

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday I went to fill up my motorcycle with gas around 7:30 pm.
I just mentioned to the attendant that he served two cars that arrived after me before me, and oh my god, he responded with such anger that I had to tell him that masturbation is healthier! Poor guy, a disaster.
The first attendant closest to the sidewalk, dark-skinned, with a non-Buenos Aires accent, I didn't even want to ask his name. He was so angry. 🤦🏻‍♀️

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia Nadia, lamentamos mucho la mala experiencia de servicio que obtuviste, estamos trabajando para remediarlo, podes comunicarte via mail al siguiente correo: info.acabelgrano@gmail.com, te esperamos nuevamente en YPF ACA Belgrano.

Suelo venir a cargar a la estacion puesto que es la que más cerca me queda, y la verdad que la atención siempre es cordial, respetuosa y amena. Hoy en particular me atencion Rocio y Ricardo que dejaron bastante a gusto. Recomendable

I usually come to this station to recharge my batteries since it's the closest one to me, and the service is always friendly, respectful, and pleasant. Today, in particular, Rocío and Ricardo helped me, and they were very helpful. Highly recommended.
